material_options.name: RCC
material_options.description: Reinforced Cement Concrete - highest strength for load-bearing

material_options.name: Steel Frame
material_options.description: Steel structural frame - excellent for long spans

material_options.name: Precast Concrete Panel
material_options.description: Pre-cast panels - quick installation, consistent quality

results.explanation: This load-bearing wall spans 10.0m and carries structural load. RCC provides the compressive strength to bear upper-floor loads across a 10.0m span. Red brick would risk cracking under sustained axial stress at this length.
